mapper.select: select * from store where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and owner_member_idx = #{ownerMemberIdx}
mapper.delete: delete from store where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and owner_member_idx = #{ownerMemberIdx}
mapper.update: update store set store_name = #{storeName}, store_description = #{storeDescription}, store_phone = #{storePhone}, minimum_order_amount = #{minimumOrderAmount}, store_address1 = #{storeAddress1}, store_address2 = #{storeAddress2}, supports_delivery = #{supportsDelivery}, supports_onsite = #{supportsOnsite}, store_status = #{storeStatus}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} where store_idx = #{storeIdx} and owner_member_idx = #{ownerMemberIdx}
mapper.insert: insert into store (owner_member_idx, store_name, store_description, store_phone, minimum_order_amount, store_address1, store_address2, supports_delivery, supports_onsite, store_status, longitude, latitude) values( #{ownerMemberIdx}, #{storeName}, #{storeDescription}, #{storePhone}, #{minimumOrderAmount}, #{storeAddress1}, #{storeAddress2}, #{supportsDelivery}, #{supportsOnsite}, #{storeStatus}, #{longitude}, #{latitude})
